heading: Feedback
intro: Your feedback shapes how we roll AI tools out more broadly. Findings from this pilot inform policy across all platforms, including ChatGPT and Gemini.

cards.title: What worked well
cards.body: Tasks where Claude saved real time or produced something better than expected. What did you ask? How long would it have taken without it?

cards.title: What didn't work
cards.body: Tasks where Claude got it wrong, missed the point, or wasn't worth the effort. What happened?

cards.title: Surprises
cards.body: Anything unexpected, good or bad. Did Claude handle something unusually well? Did it make a potentially costly error?

cards.title: Gaps
cards.body: Things you wanted to do but couldn't. Access you needed. Features that would have made a difference.

body: Use the thumbs up / thumbs down buttons on any Claude response. Thumbs down is especially valuable. You can add a comment when you rate.
note: We'll share a simple way to collect broader observations beyond individual responses. Look out for a follow-up from the programme team.
